name: Shashank Sardesai
bio: Co-founder of EverTrust Legal and former professional at Wadia Ghandy & Co., HSA Advocates, and Khaitan Legal Associates. Specializes in commercial contracts including NDAs, lease deeds, loan agreements, mortgage deeds, and service agreements.

name: Akanksha Mishra
bio: Independent litigator practicing at the Bombay High Court, Nagpur Bench. Has trained 1500+ learners in contract drafting with an average rating of 96.5/100 and advised startups, media companies, and public sector organizations.

name: Pranjal Doshi
bio: Cambridge corporate law postgraduate with prior experience at Trilegal and Khaitan & Co. Specializes in mergers & acquisitions, private equity, shareholder agreements, and investment documentation.

name: Arunima Jha
role: Head Legal Counsel, Omnicom Media Group
bio: Corporate legal leader with 10+ years of experience across media, technology, and privacy law. Previously served as Legal Counsel at BookMyShow and K Raheja Corp.

name: Adv. Jaibatruka Mohanta
bio: Practicing advocate and Research Associate at CEERA, NLSIU. Advises the Government of India on criminal law reforms and teaches advanced contracts, procurement, and public policy.

name: H. B. Keshava
bio: Managing Attorney specializing in Intellectual Property Law with experience as a guest faculty at New Law College Pune and Career Launcher Chennai.

name: Gourav Mohanty
bio: Gold medalist and former Senior Associate at Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas. Award-winning contract drafting professional practicing commercial litigation.

name: Anup Menon V
bio: Corporate lawyer specializing in commercial contracts, banking, technology law, compliance, and startup advisory with extensive domestic and international experience.

name: Tanuj Kalia
bio: Founder of Lawctopus, author of 'Law as a Career', TEDx speaker, Business World Legal 40 Under 40 awardee, and experienced negotiator in business and legal education.

name: Bhumesh Verma
bio: Corporate lawyer with over 25 years of experience. Former partner at Khaitan & Co. and author of 'Practical Guide to Drafting Commercial Contracts'. Recorded lecture faculty.

name: Shayonee Dasgupta
bio: Former associate at Trilegal and Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas. Consultant at IDIA with extensive experience in legal research, writing, and education.

name: Debanshu Khettry
bio: Founder of Standard Indian Legal Citation (SILC), corporate lawyer, investor, and legal educator with experience at leading law firms and international legal practice.
